name: Cloud-Native & Application Modernization (DACH)
description: Enterprises in the DACH region modernizing legacy applications through containerization, Kubernetes adoption, serverless architectures, and DevOps/GitOps transformation. Spans organizations moving from traditional VMs to cloud-native platforms.

segmentation.buyer_profile: CTO, VP Engineering, Head of Platform Engineering, Cloud Architect

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation based on container platform and app-modernization market in DACH

tam.description: Total application modernization and container platform market in DACH (~EUR 5B)

sam.description: Managed Kubernetes, container platform, and modernization consulting addressable by T-Systems

som.description: Capturable share in managed container platforms and modernization advisory

competitive_landscape: Red Hat/IBM, VMware/Broadcom, AWS EKS, Azure AKS, Google GKE, Accenture, Thoughtworks, local cloud-native consultancies
